description_long: This is a rectangular desk with a light brown, flat tabletop and a sturdy, boxy frame. The desk features a solid front panel and two side panels, with the right side incorporating an open shelf or cubby for storage. The legs are simple and straight, providing stable support, and the overall design is utilitarian and functional, suitable for work or study. The materials appear to be a combination of wood or laminate for the top and painted or laminated engineered wood for the frame. The finish is smooth and matte, with no visible hardware or decorative elements. The desk is in excellent condition, with clean lines and no signs of wear or damage.
description: A rectangular desk with a light brown top, solid front panel, and an open shelf on the right side. The design is simple, sturdy, and functional, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full tabletop, solid front panel, and open right-side shelf.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the open shelf structure.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a plain, solid rear panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Left side view showing a solid side panel with no shelf or openings.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the open shelf on the right and the solid front panel, while the back is a plain, solid panel with no openings.
